title: carex viridula f. rousseauiana
intro: Carex viridula f. rousseauiana, also known as the green sedge, is a type of fern or sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carex viridula f. rousseauiana include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use.
